debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
    classical
    have hlaw : HasLaw X Ber(u, p) P := hX
    have hPi : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) (toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) P := by
      simpa [bernoulliOn, hi] using hlaw.hasLaw_comp (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s)
    have hPj : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ j ∈ X ω) (toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) P := by
      simpa [bernoulliOn, hj] using hlaw.hasLaw_comp (fun s : Set ι ↦ j ∈ s)
    simpa [HasLaw] using (hPi.map_eq.trans hPj.map_eq.symm)
